sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43180" key="e(teromoio/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερομοιότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">identity in diversity</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg019:1:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Theol.Plat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
